# KOKA Group - DJ & Animation Musicale Sur-Mesure

## About
KOKA Group is a professional DJ and event animation agency based in Nantes, France. Founded in 2022 by Camille Bouillet and Colin Fontaine, the agency specializes in bespoke musical experiences for weddings, corporate events, private parties, and artistic collaborations.

## Services
- Wedding DJ & Animation (ceremony, cocktail, reception, dancefloor)
- Corporate Events (seminars, galas, company parties, team buildings)
- Private Parties (garden parties, pool parties, birthdays, concept events)
- Artistic Collaborations (fashion shows, art exhibitions, sound installations)

## Coverage
- Based in Nantes, Pays de la Loire, France
- Available throughout France and internationally
